title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 194.384 - Written standards required for protection of mother's right to determine final disposition
text:
194.384.  Written standards required for protection of mother's right to determine final disposition. — Every hospital, outpatient birthing clinic, and any other health care facility licensed to operate in this state shall adopt written standards for the final disposition of the remains of a human fetus as provided in sections 194.375 to 194.390 for protection of a mother's right pursuant to section 194.378 and for notice as required in section 194.387.
(L. 2004 H.B. 1136)
